entries.source: A good learning session has a loop
entries.value: Ikaskuntza-saio on batek ziklo bat du

entries.source: A practical look at how AI can make learning clearer, more personal, and more accessible without turning students into passive answer collectors.
entries.value: AIak ikaskuntza argiagoa, pertsonalagoa eta eskuragarriagoa nola egin dezakeen begirada praktikoa, ikasleak erantzun-biltzaile pasibo bihurtu gabe.

entries.source: A serious learning companion should help with the work around the answer:
entries.value: Ikaskuntza-lagun serio batek erantzunaren inguruko lanean lagundu behar luke:

entries.source: Access matters
entries.value: Sarbideak garrantzia du

entries.source: AI learning
entries.value: AI ikaskuntza

entries.source: An AI learning companion should not pretend to be a magic authority. It should not erase uncertainty, replace teachers, or train learners to copy answers. The best systems are honest about limits and clear about the difference between help and handoff.
entries.value: AI ikaskuntza-lagun batek ez luke autoritate magikoa dela itxuratu behar. Ez luke ziurgabetasuna ezabatu, irakasleak ordezkatu edo ikasleak erantzunak kopiatzera trebatu behar. Sistemarik onenak zintzoak dira mugei buruz eta argi bereizten dute laguntza eta eskualdatzea.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step.
entries.value: Eskatu lehen urrats txiki bat.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning.
entries.value: Eskatu AIari zure arrazoiketa egiaztatzeko.

entries.source: checking whether the learner can explain the idea back.
entries.value: ikasleak ideia berriro azal dezakeen egiaztatzea.

entries.source: choosing the right starting level;
entries.value: hasierako maila egokia aukeratzea;

entries.source: End with a recap from memory.
entries.value: Amaitu oroimenezko laburpen batekin.

entries.source: For a learner, that can feel very different from searching the web. Search gives pages. A learning companion gives a path.
entries.value: Ikaslearentzat, hori oso desberdina senti daiteke weba bilatzetik. Bilaketak orriak ematen ditu. Ikaskuntza-lagun batek bidea ematen du.

entries.source: For a wider view of how the public pages connect, browse the AI learning map, the subject hubs, or the AI learning prompt library. Those pages are designed to make the product understandable to learners and discoverable to search systems without hiding the useful parts behind an account wall.
entries.value: Orri publikoak nola konektatzen diren ikuspegi zabalagoan ikusteko, arakatu AI ikaskuntza-mapa, gai-hubak edo AI ikaskuntza-prompten liburutegia. Orri horiek produktua ikasleentzat ulergarri eta bilaketa-sistementzat aurkigarri egiteko diseinatuta daude, zati erabilgarriak kontu baten hormaren atzean ezkutatu gabe.

entries.source: giving examples before abstractions when needed;
entries.value: behar denean abstrakzioen aurretik adibideak ematea;

entries.source: Information is everywhere. Understanding is still unevenly distributed.
entries.value: Informazioa nonahi dago. Ulermena oraindik ez dago berdin banatuta.

entries.source: noticing what the learner already understands;
entries.value: ikasleak dagoeneko zer ulertzen duen ohartzea;

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is not equally available. A free public AI learning platform can help reduce that access gap by giving more people a patient first place to learn.
entries.value: Tutoretza pribatua indartsua da, baina ez dago berdin eskuragarri. Doako AI ikaskuntza-plataforma publiko batek sarbide-arrakala hori murrizten lagun dezake, pertsona gehiagori ikasteko lehen leku paziente bat emanez.

entries.source: Repair the weak spot.
entries.value: Konpondu puntu ahula.

entries.source: Say the goal in ordinary language.
entries.value: Esan helburua hizkera arruntean.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything if you have a topic in mind. Try Socratic Instruction if you want questions instead of an explanation. Use Flashcard Builder when you need to remember, or Exam Prep Planner when the problem is organizing your study time.
entries.value: Hasi Learn Anything-rekin gai bat buruan baduzu. Probatu Socratic Instruction azalpen baten ordez galderak nahi badituzu. Erabili Flashcard Builder gogoratu behar duzunean, edo Exam Prep Planner arazoa ikasketa-denbora antolatzea denean.

entries.source: That does not replace teachers, communities, books, or schools. It gives learners another route in. It can help a student start homework, a parent explain a concept, a self-taught builder learn code, or a curious person follow a question that might otherwise disappear.
entries.value: Horrek ez ditu irakasleak, komunitateak, liburuak edo eskolak ordezkatzen. Ikasleei beste sarrera-bide bat ematen die. Ikasle bati etxeko lanak hasten lagun diezaioke, guraso bati kontzeptu bat azaltzen, bere kabuz ikasten duen eraikitzaile bati kodea ikasten, edo pertsona jakin-min bati bestela desagertuko litzatekeen galdera bati jarraitzen.

entries.source: That gap is why an AI learning companion matters. A good companion does more than answer a question. It helps a learner choose a starting point, explains the idea in plain language, checks whether it made sense, and keeps going when the first explanation does not land.
entries.value: Arrakala horregatik da garrantzitsua AI ikaskuntza-laguna. Lagun on batek galdera bati erantzutea baino gehiago egiten du. Ikasleari abiapuntua aukeratzen laguntzen dio, ideia hizkera arruntean azaltzen du, zentzua izan duen egiaztatzen du eta lehen azalpena iristen ez denean jarraitzen du.

entries.source: That is especially important for homework. The useful question is not "Can AI produce the answer?" It usually can. The useful question is "Can AI help the learner understand the path to the answer?" That is why the guide on studying with AI without cheating yourself focuses on hints, checks, and transfer practice.
entries.value: Hori bereziki garrantzitsua da etxeko lanetan. Galdera erabilgarria ez da "AIak erantzuna ekoitzi dezake?" Normalean bai. Galdera erabilgarria da "AIak ikasleari erantzunerako bidea ulertzen lagun diezaioke?" Horregatik, zeure buruari tranparik egin gabe AIarekin ikasteko gidak pistetan, egiaztapenetan eta transferentzia-praktikan jartzen du fokua.

entries.source: That is the standard inspir is aiming for: learning that feels accessible, personal, playful, and useful for anyone with curiosity and an internet connection.
entries.value: Hori da inspir-ek bilatzen duen estandarra: jakin-mina eta internet-konexioa duen edonorentzat eskuragarri, pertsonal, jostagarri eta erabilgarri sentitzen den ikaskuntza.

entries.source: That is why inspir separates learning jobs into public modes. If you want a gentle explanation, start with Learn Anything. If you want to reason through a concept instead of being lectured, use Socratic Instruction. If you are stuck on an assignment, Homework Coach is a better fit than a generic answer engine. The format should serve the learning job.
entries.value: Horregatik bereizten ditu inspir-ek ikaskuntza-lanak modu publikoetan. Azalpen leun bat nahi baduzu, hasi Learn Anything-rekin. Kontzeptu bat hitzaldirik gabe arrazoitu nahi baduzu, erabili Socratic Instruction. Lan batean trabatuta bazaude, Homework Coach egokiagoa da erantzun-motor generiko bat baino. Formatuak ikaskuntza-lanari zerbitzatu behar dio.

entries.source: That loop appears across the platform. Math Step Coach breaks a problem into steps. Flashcard Builder turns notes into recall practice. Quiz Me On Trivia adds pressure-tested retrieval. Writing Coach helps improve a draft without replacing the writer.
entries.value: Ziklo hori plataforma osoan agertzen da. Math Step Coach-ek problema bat urratsetan zatitzen du. Flashcard Builder-ek oharrak gogoratze-praktika bihurtzen ditu. Quiz Me On Trivia-k presiopeko gogoratzea gehitzen du. Writing Coach-ek zirriborro bat hobetzen laguntzen du idazlea ordezkatu gabe.

entries.source: The best AI learning sessions are not one long answer. They look more like a loop:
entries.value: AI ikaskuntza-saio onenak ez dira erantzun luze bakarra. Ziklo baten antz handiagoa dute:

entries.source: The best outcome is not a perfect answer. It is the moment a learner says, "I think I get it now. Let me try."
entries.value: Emaitzarik onena ez da erantzun perfektu bat. Ikasleak "Uste dut orain ulertzen dudala. Utzi saiatzen" esaten duen unea da.

entries.source: The common idea is simple: keep the learner active. AI should make thinking easier to start, not unnecessary to do.
entries.value: Ideia komuna sinplea da: mantendu ikaslea aktibo. AIak pentsatzen hastea erraztu behar du, ez pentsatzea alferrikako bihurtu.

entries.source: The easiest version of an AI tutor is a box that gives polished answers. That is useful sometimes, but it is not enough. A learner who only receives answers can leave with the page finished and the skill unchanged.
entries.value: AI tutore baten bertsiorik errazena erantzun landuak ematen dituen kutxa bat da. Batzuetan erabilgarria da, baina ez da nahikoa. Erantzunak bakarrik jasotzen dituen ikasleak orria amaituta eta trebetasuna aldatu gabe utz dezake.

entries.source: The format should serve the learning job.
entries.value: Formatuak ikaskuntza-lanari zerbitzatu behar dio.

entries.source: The goal is confidence
entries.value: Helburua konfiantza da

entries.source: The important move is to start with a real learning job, not a perfect prompt. A good companion can help shape the path once you begin.
entries.value: Mugimendu garrantzitsua benetako ikaskuntza-lan batekin hastea da, ez prompt perfektu batekin. Lagun on batek bidea moldatzen lagun dezake hasi ondoren.

entries.source: The job is not just answering
entries.value: Lana ez da erantzutea bakarrik

entries.source: The most useful AI learning tools have a few habits in common:
entries.value: AI ikaskuntza-tresna erabilgarrienek ohitura batzuk partekatzen dituzte:

entries.source: They adapt the level without making the learner feel small.
entries.value: Maila egokitzen dute ikaslea txiki sentiarazi gabe.

entries.source: They ask questions when the goal is unclear.
entries.value: Helburua argi ez dagoenean galderak egiten dituzte.

entries.source: They encourage practice, not just reading.
entries.value: Praktika bultzatzen dute, ez irakurketa bakarrik.

entries.source: They give examples that match the learner's world.
entries.value: Ikaslearen munduarekin bat datozen adibideak ematen dituzte.

entries.source: They make uncertainty visible when facts need checking.
entries.value: Datuak egiaztatu behar direnean ziurgabetasuna ikusgai egiten dute.

entries.source: This is why inspir is built around learning modes. Sometimes you need a clear explanation. Sometimes you need Socratic questions. Sometimes you need a quiz, flashcards, debate practice, a writing coach, or a historical roleplay.
entries.value: Horregatik dago inspir ikaskuntza-moduen inguruan eraikita. Batzuetan azalpen argia behar duzu. Batzuetan galdera sokratikoak. Batzuetan galdetegia, ikasketa-txartelak, debate-praktika, idazketa-coach bat edo roleplay historikoa behar dituzu.

entries.source: This matters for schools and families because the first barrier is often not talent. It is the cost of help, the fear of asking a "basic" question, or the lack of a patient person at the exact moment confusion appears. A free public companion lowers the cost of beginning.
entries.value: Honek axola du eskolentzat eta familientzat, lehen oztopoa sarritan ez baita talentua. Laguntzaren kostua, "oinarrizko" galdera bat egitearen beldurra edo nahasmena agertzen den une zehatzean pertsona paziente bat falta izatea da. Doako lagun publiko batek hasteko kostua murrizten du.

entries.source: Try the companion
entries.value: Probatu laguna

entries.source: Try the step yourself.
entries.value: Saiatu urratsa zeuk.

entries.source: turning passive reading into practice;
entries.value: irakurketa pasiboa praktika bihurtzea;

entries.source: What an AI learning companion should do for everyone
entries.value: Zer egin beharko luke AI ikaskuntza-lagun batek guztiontzat

entries.source: What it should not do
entries.value: Zer ez luke egin behar

entries.source: What the companion should provide
entries.value: Lagunak zer eman beharko luke
